MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 15, 2025 in Department 304, Line 3.
PLAINTIFFS GUSTAVO BARRERA, MERCIE BARRERA's Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff GRANTED under CCP 36(a). No Opposition filed. The trial date is July 28, 2025, at 11:15 a.m. in Department 206. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is August 13, 2025. The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is July 22, 2025. A further case management conference is set for June 17, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. A mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, July 24, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is excused for good cause. A request to excuse a personal appearance must be submitted to Department503@sftc.org two weeks before the mandatory settlement conference. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Johnny Sengmany, Not Reported. (304)
